metadata.title: PromptFlow - Access Your Prompt Library in Any AI Tool
metadata.description: PromptFlow helps you organize and open your prompt library with ⌘K across ChatGPT, Claude, DeepSeek, Gemini, and other AI tools.

hero.badge: Supports ChatGPT, Claude, DeepSeek & 10+ AI platforms
hero.title: Open Your Prompt Library Without Leaving the Chat
hero.subtitle: ⌘K Access · Organized Prompts · Works Across AI Tools
hero.description: Press ⌘K on ChatGPT, Claude, DeepSeek, Gemini, and other AI tools to open your saved prompts in seconds. Keep your prompt library organized and ready to use.
hero.screenshotAlt: PromptFlow product interface showing command palette quick access

quickAccess.title: ⌘K Quick Access
quickAccess.description: Open your prompt library from the page you're already on. No tab switching, no copy-paste between notes and chats.

smartOrg.title: Smart Organization
smartOrg.description: Organize prompts with tags, folders, and search so you can find the right one quickly, even as your library grows.

crossPlatform.title: Works Across AI Tools
crossPlatform.description: Use the same prompt library across ChatGPT, Claude, DeepSeek, Kimi, Gemini, and more.

community.title: Community Picks
community.subtitle: Browse useful prompts shared by the community and add them to your prompt library in one click
community.installPrompt: Please install the PromptFlow extension to use this feature

useCases.title: Who It's For
useCases.subtitle: Whether you're a creator, developer, or operator, PromptFlow boosts your AI productivity

creator.title: Content Creators
creator.description: Manage copy templates, headline formulas, content frameworks. Let AI accelerate your creative process.

developer.title: Developers
developer.description: Save debugging prompts, refactoring instructions, and code review checklists so you can reuse them when you need them.

operator.title: Operators
operator.description: Keep analysis prompts, report templates, and research frameworks in one place for repeatable work.

cta.title: Build a Prompt Library You Can Actually Reuse
cta.subtitle: Install the extension and open your saved prompts anywhere you work with AI

metadata.title: Community Prompt Library | PromptFlow
metadata.description: Explore writing, coding, image, and workflow prompts shared by the PromptFlow community. Add useful prompts to your library in one click.

community.title: Discover Community Prompts
community.subtitle: Explore prompts from the community and add useful ones to your prompt library
community.installPrompt: Please install the PromptFlow extension to import this prompt

emptyState.title: No results found
emptyState.description: Try different search terms, or share the first prompt with the community

footer.description: PromptFlow helps you organize and open your prompt library across ChatGPT, Claude, DeepSeek, and other AI tools.
